name: Ayesha Rahman
bio: Met at BUET orientation in 2019. We bonded over endless chai sessions and late-night study marathons. She's now doing her Masters in Canada.

name: Tanvir Hossain
bio: Senior dev who mentored me at my first job. Always has sharp advice on system design and career growth. We do bi-weekly code reviews together.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: My favourite cousin who lives in Chittagong. We grew up together during every Eid holiday. She recently got married and started a bakery business.

name: Rifat Karim
bio: College roommate and workout partner. We pushed each other through HSC and still hit the gym together every weekend when possible.

name: Sumaiya Akter
bio: Best friend since Class 3. We've survived through everything together — school, heartbreaks, and career struggles. Life got busy but she's irreplaceable.

name: Imran Chowdhury
bio: Frontend dev at my current company. We collaborate daily on product design and often grab lunch together. Great guy with an eye for clean UI.

name: Sabrina Islam
bio: My thesis partner in final year. We spent six months drowning in research papers together. She moved to Sylhet after graduation and we rarely talk now.

name: Mahfuz Ahmed
bio: Grew up on the same street in Mirpur. We've been friends for over 15 years. He's my go-to person whenever I need honest, unfiltered advice.
